---
title: "Project Status Report — Custom-CMS"
subtitle: "Reporting Period: 2026-W21 · 2026-05-08 to 2026-05-21"
date: "2026-05-21"
author: "Marcus Morrisey"
client: "PCFS"
docket: "PD25-1186-CO"
format:
  docx:
    reference-doc: _templates/report-template.docx
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
---

# Project Status Report

| | |
|---|---|
| **Client** | PCFS |
| **Project** | Custom-CMS |
| **Docket #** | PD25-1186-CO |
| **Project Manager** | Marcus Morrisey |
| **Reporting Date** | 2026-05-21 |
| **Start Date** | 2025-11-17 |
| **Planned Finish** | 2026-03-31 |
| **Estimated Finish** | 2026-07-31 |

## Health Dashboard

| Indicator | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| Overall Health | 🔴 Red |
| Schedule | 🔴 Red |
| Scope | 🟡 Yellow |
| Budget | 🟡 Yellow |
| Client's Feeling | 🟡 Yellow |

## Project Status & Dates

**Project Status:** The project entered a formal reset this period following a May 11 alignment meeting with PCFS leadership, resulting in the abuse module being carved out as a separate iteration and the go-live target revised to end of July 2026. Case file wireframe reviews were completed, client and family data module UAT was launched, and a focused weekly stakeholder cadence (Marcus/Ross/Christina) was established to maintain momentum through the remaining iterations.

**Variance:** Planned finish 2026-03-31 → Estimated finish 2026-07-31 (+122 days)

## Progress This Period

> ⚠ Meetings dated 2026-05-05 and 2026-05-06 fall within the prior period (2026-W19) but were not ingested in that cycle. Progress items and decisions from those meetings are included in this report.

- **Intake wireframe review completed** (May 5, two sessions) — Full PCFS stakeholder walkthrough of intake module: document upload modal, referral source and limited profile handling, eligibility check, persons involved and genogram, issue categories grid, actions taken, intake log, supervisor review queue (pool model confirmed), SLA timer logic (business hours + holiday calendar), prior contact check, and CFIS entry workflow.
- **GL accounts / PJC codes file received** (May 5) — Finance GL code mapping file received by Ross during session; Sage 300 chart-of-accounts mapping now available for development.
- **Case file wireframe review Session 2 completed** (May 6) — Full review with broader PCFS stakeholder group: legal status order-expiry tracking, EPR 90-day placement tracker, restrict case redesign (conflict of interest / safety concern), removal of "Change Case Type" functionality, kinship placement type role restrictions, IRAP rate sheet triggers on new/changed placements, Signs of Safety tab design (harm matrix, safety plan, sharing circle, supervisor review cadence), and face sheet generation workflow.
- **PCFS Reset Meeting held** (May 11) — Formal re-alignment with Ross, Kelvin, and Christina: abuse module carved out as separate iteration, July end-of-month go-live target set, meeting cadence reset, UAT approach and tester list confirmed, data migration path explored.
- **AI-generated spec quality review completed** (May 13) — Marcus and Gabrielle reviewed case file spec; assessed ~70–75% QA-ready as first draft; specific gaps identified and documented.
- **UAT feedback process finalized and walkthrough completed** (May 13–21) — devteam@idfusion.com → Freshdesk triage (Gabrielle/Varun) → ClickUp for developers; status reports to Ross; UAT walkthrough for client and family data module completed.

## Milestones & Schedule

| ID | Milestone | Baseline End | Estimated End | Status | Variance |
|----|-----------|-------------|---------------|--------|----------|
| M-01 | Stage 1 — Discovery and Requirements complete | 2025-12-22 | 2026-03-26 | Delayed | +94d |
| M-02 | Stage 2 — Solution Design complete | 2026-01-31 | 2026-03-26 | Delayed | +54d |
| M-03 | Stage 3 — All 9 iterations complete / system ready | 2026-03-31 | 2026-06-30 | Delayed | +91d |
| M-04 | Go-Live | 2026-03-31 | 2026-07-31 | Delayed | +122d |
| M-05 | Stage 4 — Post-launch support complete | 2026-04-30 | 2026-08-28 | Delayed | +120d |

```{mermaid}
gantt
  title Milestone Schedule
  dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
  section Stage 1 Complete
    Baseline  :milestone, 2025-12-22, 0d
    Estimated :milestone, crit, 2026-03-26, 0d
  section Stage 2 Complete
    Baseline  :milestone, 2026-01-31, 0d
    Estimated :milestone, crit, 2026-03-26, 0d
  section All Iterations Complete
    Baseline  :milestone, 2026-03-31, 0d
    Estimated :milestone, crit, 2026-06-30, 0d
  section Go-Live
    Baseline  :milestone, 2026-03-31, 0d
    Estimated :milestone, crit, 2026-07-31, 0d
  section Post-Launch Support
    Baseline  :milestone, 2026-04-30, 0d
    Estimated :milestone, crit, 2026-08-28, 0d
```

## Decisions Made

> ⚠ Decisions from 2026-05-05 and 2026-05-06 meetings are included here (late W19 — not captured in the prior period report).

| Decision | Made By | Date | Notes |
|----------|---------|------|-------|
| Intake task assignment: pool/queue model — tasks go to supervisor queue, self-assigned | Darryl / Marcus | 2026-05-05 | Aligns with after-hours workflow |
| SLA timer uses business hours + PCFS holiday calendar; pauses over non-business hours | Marcus / Ross | 2026-05-05 | Holiday calendar configurable in admin panel |
| Recommended response time: auto-fill from issue categories, no worker override | Darryl / Marcus | 2026-05-05 | |
| Main SLA timer continues when intake sent back to worker; worker receives sub-deadline only | Marcus / Darryl | 2026-05-05 | |
| Multiple simultaneous intakes permitted for same person — warn but do not block | Marcus / Darryl | 2026-05-05 | |
| Prior contact check gates CFIS admin entry only — does not block intake progression | May 5 group | 2026-05-05 | |
| Browser support: Edge primary, Safari secondary | Ross / Marcus | 2026-05-05 | Dev/QA test matrix covers both |
| Intake status values: Open and Closed only (no intermediate statuses) | May 5 group | 2026-05-05 | |
| Issue category subcategories required — two-level selection in intake form | Darryl / Marcus | 2026-05-05 | Darryl to provide full provincial IM form list (A-161) |
| Document types for intake upload modal: Receipts, Legal, Safety, Other | May 5 group | 2026-05-05 | Configurable in admin panel |
| Legal document upload restricted to legal team, supervisors, and directors (workers read-only) | PCFS CRDs / Marcus | 2026-05-06 | |
| Legal order expiry notifications: 40 days (worker task), 30 days (CRD escalation), 14 days (further escalation) | PCFS CRDs / Marcus | 2026-05-06 | Worker reassigns to legal team once their part done |
| EPR placements: 90-day tracker added to prompt long-term placement search | PCFS staff | 2026-05-06 | |
| "Change Case Type" functionality removed — close existing case and open new case instead | CRDs / Marcus | 2026-05-06 | Mirrors existing CFIS process |
| Restrict Case: 2 reasons (conflict of interest / safety concern); supervisors can restrict and add viewers | Kelvin / CRDs / Marcus | 2026-05-06 | After-hours supervisors/directors get automatic access to all restricted cases |
| Kinship department creates kinship-2/3/4/5, EPR, and agency resource home placement types | PCFS kinship staff / Marcus | 2026-05-06 | Supervisors have full access; other workers create remaining types |
| IRAP rate sheet triggered on new placement (worker → CRD) and change of placement (worker confirms → CRD if yes) | PCFS CRDs / Colleen / Marcus | 2026-05-06 | |
| Face sheet: "Generate Face Sheet" button on Finance tab (not auto-generate); pre-populates from placement data | PCFS CRDs / Marcus | 2026-05-06 | Worker edits before saving |
| Multiple harm matrices supported; each upload triggers a new risk assessment task; history in Documents tab | Kelvin / CRDs | 2026-05-06 | |
| Risk assessment score ≥6 triggers safety plan requirement; safety plan has active/inactive status with end date | Kelvin / CRDs | 2026-05-06 | |
| Supervisor SOS review: quarterly (every 4 months) by default; escalates to weekly for risk score ≥9 | Kelvin / Colleen / CRDs | 2026-05-06 | |
| Safety plan renamed "Safety Plan" with final option/checkbox; multiple safety plans supported | PCFS CRDs | 2026-05-06 | |
| Abuse module carved out as its own separate iteration (not part of case management) | Rob / Marcus / Ross / Kelvin | 2026-05-11 | Redesigned as intake-form wizard style |
| Go-live timeline revised to end of July 2026 | Rob / Marcus / Ross | 2026-05-11 | June 30 acknowledged as unrealistic |
| Meeting cadence reset: weekly standup (Marcus/Ross/Christina); in-person every 3 weeks; Kelvin available Tuesdays | Rob / Marcus / Ross | 2026-05-11 | |
| UAT uses real-world scenarios with anonymized data — no prescriptive test scripts | Rob / Marcus / Ross | 2026-05-11 | |
| UAT environment: PCFS's Microsoft Azure only (no separate IDFusion-hosted environment) | Rob / Marcus | 2026-05-11 | |
| Data migration: Varun needs vulnerable sector check before accessing FamCare SQL database | Ross / Kelvin | 2026-05-11 | |
| Service delivery / finance review meeting canceled — IDFusion to digest and return with recommendations | Rob / Marcus | 2026-05-11 | |
| Skabe Support deferred to V2; V1 = upload forms as documents to case file | Kelvin / Ross | 2026-05-11 | |
| Standard logging definition at top of all spec docs: always include date, time, user | Marcus / Gabrielle | 2026-05-13 | Additional fields specified per action |
| UAT feedback triage: Gabrielle and Varun own Freshdesk → ClickUp; Ross receives open/closed/backlog status reports | Gabrielle / Marcus | 2026-05-13 | |

## Action Items & Commitments

| # | Owner | Item | Due Date | Status | Carried Over? |
|---|-------|------|----------|--------|---------------|
| A-055 | Hailey / Marcus | Clarify and document requirements for role-based access, high-profile cases, and conflict-of-interest restrictions; access model decisions made Apr 28 | 2026-01-29 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-078 | Marcus | Prepare field-definitions Excel template (tab per screen, field names, dropdown values, rules column) | 2026-01-29 | Open | Yes |
| A-079 | Barry / Bev | Provide exact Sage 300 version/build number for integration documentation | 2026-01-29 | Open | Yes |
| A-082 | Marcus | Establish revised target dates; prepare status update for Jaren and Rob with technical challenges and revised timeline | 2026-02-12 | Open | Yes |
| A-083 | Marcus / Varun | Complete Iteration 1 development; dev walkthrough completed 2026-02-24; development actively underway | 2026-02-12 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-104 | Christine | Consult Kinship department and QA to ensure licensing and placement info accurately represented in system design | 2026-03-26 | Open | Yes |
| A-105 | Marcus / Ross | Determine agency email account for external notification sends (Microsoft REST API integration) | 2026-03-26 | Open | Yes |
| A-106 | Marcus | Implement address-based search tab (search address fields on existing records; show associated individuals/cases) | 2026-03-26 | Open | Yes |
| A-107 | Marcus | Consult after-hours team for additional requirements for address-based search feature | 2026-03-26 | Open | Yes |
| A-109 | Clemene | Provide Marcus with finance contact email for follow-up | 2026-04-07 | Open | Yes |
| A-110 | Christine | Send recurring calendar invite for biweekly in-person meetings | 2026-04-07 | Open | Yes |
| A-112 | Clemene / Rob | Review contract and create revised, clean project timeline and implementation schedule | 2026-04-07 | Open | Yes |
| A-114 | Ken Jacobs / Antonio Faiazza | Complete Azure post-setup: verify .onmicrosoft tenant, share SQL DB credentials, whitelist IDFusion IP, fine-tune RBAC groups | 2026-04-09 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-115 | Ken Jacobs / Marcus | Deploy Wabanong application code to Azure dev environment | 2026-04-23 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-116 | Marcus | Document Azure infrastructure recap (high-level) for Clemene; store in SharePoint | 2026-04-09 | Open | Yes |
| A-118 | Marcus / Gabrielle | Design and implement finance dashboard for finance users: track finance sheet requests, in-app and email notifications for pending approvals | 2026-04-23 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-119 | Marcus | Spec cleanup: drop-downs only (remove buttons/radio buttons), update pronoun field, update person record spec | 2026-04-23 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-120 | Marcus | Clarify with Ross: multiple open intakes per person, task assignment model, status terminology | 2026-04-23 | **Complete** | Yes |
| A-123 | Marcus | Define and document formal UAT sign-off procedure with IDFusion | 2026-04-30 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-124 | Kelvin / Clemene | Send abuse program forms and Excel template (PII removed) to IDFusion for requirements mapping | 2026-04-28 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-125 | Marcus | Share IDFusion's current abuse-related resources/forms; identify requirement gaps | 2026-04-28 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-127 | Christine / Clemene | Provide IDFusion with complete list and definitions of all legal terms used by agency | 2026-05-07 | Open | Yes |
| A-128 | Marcus / Clemene | Cross-reference agency law/regulations with system terminology to ensure consistency | 2026-05-07 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-129 | IDFusion / Kelvin | Set up alpha testing access for Kelvin, Christine, and Darryl | 2026-05-07 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-130 | Marcus | Translate project timeline into Outlook calendar invites for key testing/review milestones | 2026-04-28 | Open | Yes |
| A-131 | IDFusion dev | Implement Apr 13 demo feedback items: footer typo, gender field, Child profile type, auto age-18 upgrade, ID lookup table, abuse tab, address history, CEFAS copy report, finance processing buttons | 2026-04-30 | Open | Yes |
| A-135 | IDFusion / Rob / Ross | Define post-go-live support tiers (bronze/silver/gold) and SLAs | 2026-05-28 | Open | Yes |
| A-136 | Bev / Christine / Barry / Clemene | Send all finance templates and forms (headers only, no PII); RBC CSV headers still needed | 2026-04-28 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-137 | Bev | Send Sage 300 chart of accounts and GL codes for integration mapping | 2026-04-28 | **Complete** | Yes |
| A-138 | Marcus | Compile list of finance documents already received from Haley to avoid duplicate submissions | 2026-04-28 | Open | Yes |
| A-140 | Ross | Send abuse program master spreadsheet to Marcus/Gabrielle/Clemene/Christine | 2026-04-28 | Open | Yes |
| A-141 | Ross | Outlook/Teams invites to Bev/Barry for Tuesday finance slot; Eagle Boardroom booked through September | 2026-04-25 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-142 | Gabrielle | Follow up with Sherry to confirm she has started testing | 2026-04-23 | Open | Yes |
| A-143 | Marcus | Add ClickUp task for address note field (ordinary residence complexity) | 2026-04-23 | Open | Yes |
| A-144 | Marcus | Spec update: remove "new task" button from person record; task creation only from intake/case records | 2026-04-28 | Open | Yes |
| A-145 | Marcus | Validate case file wireframes/specs; CRD walkthrough completed Apr 29; May 6 review complete; revisions done | 2026-04-28 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-146 | Marcus | Create/update spec for case-specific documents tab | 2026-04-28 | Open | Yes |
| A-148 | Marcus | Send finance/placements flow documentation to Gabrielle in advance of next finance requirements session | 2026-04-23 | Open | Yes |
| A-149 | Marcus / Gabrielle | Produce detailed wireframes for finance dashboard (PO queue, credit card queue, aging/timer displays) | 2026-05-21 | Open | Yes |
| A-150 | Marcus / Gabrielle | Update finance PO workflow wireframes: worker request → supervisor approval → finance review → PO generation → receipt → Sage export | 2026-05-21 | Open | Yes |
| A-151 | Marcus / Gabrielle | Update abuse module wireframes: redesign as wizard-style intake form following May 11 reset decision | 2026-05-21 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-152 | Ross / IDFusion | Implement global holiday calendar in Wabanong system settings | 2026-05-21 | Open | Yes |
| A-153 | Kelvin (PCFS) | Send finalized abuse investigation conclusion terminology to Ross/Marcus for implementation | 2026-05-21 | Open | Yes |
| A-154 | Kelvin (PCFS) | Provide blank/redacted provincial abuse investigation form fields to IDFusion for copy-assist screen mapping | 2026-05-21 | Open | Yes |
| A-155 | Marcus | Follow up with intake team re: adding missing Manitoba CFS Act abuse issue categories | 2026-05-21 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-156 | Marcus | Clarify with ongoing services/intake team how "parenting time" is determined for case anchoring | 2026-05-21 | Open | Yes |
| A-157 | Marcus / Gabrielle | Update ongoing services wireframes: in-home/out-of-home toggle, rename checklist, placement IRAP trigger updates | 2026-05-21 | In Progress | Yes |
| A-158 | Bev / Barry (PCFS) | Send RBC bank export file column headers (CSV) to IDFusion for credit card import template | 2026-05-21 | Open | Yes |
| A-159 | Marcus | Schedule follow-up ongoing services wireframe review with CRD team after revisions complete | 2026-05-21 | Open | Yes |
| A-160 | Ross (IDFusion) | Document "Finance Assigner" role in Wabanong role architecture | 2026-05-21 | Open | Yes |
| A-161 | Darryl Boulanger (PCFS) | Provide complete issue categories and subcategories list from provincial IM form (with timeframes per category) | 2026-05-21 | Open | No |
| A-162 | Marcus / Gabrielle | Update intake wireframes: two-level category selection, actions-taken section, doc types for upload modal | 2026-05-21 | **Complete** | No |
| A-163 | Gabrielle | Update case file wireframes: legal doc restrictions, order expiry notifications, EPR tracker, Restrict Case UI, remove Change Case Type, remove legal agreement drop-down from placement tab | 2026-06-04 | **Complete** | No |
| A-164 | Gabrielle | Update placement wireframes: kinship-only placement types, Generate Face Sheet button (Finance tab), IRAP rate sheet trigger tasks | 2026-06-04 | **Complete** | No |
| A-165 | Gabrielle | Update Signs of Safety wireframes: multiple harm matrices, harm matrix triggers risk assessment, risk ≥6 triggers safety plan, active/inactive safety plan, supervisor review cadence | 2026-06-04 | **Complete** | No |
| A-166 | Ross / Campfire | Configure Azure UAT environment: Entra/conditional access accounts for all testers with expiry; IDFusion team access | 2026-05-21 | **Complete** | No |
| A-167 | Ross / Kelvin / Christina | Compile UAT tester list; draft anonymized testing scenarios for client+family data module | 2026-05-21 | **Complete** | No |
| A-168 | Ross / Campfire | Investigate FamCare SQL database as migration data source; confirm structure and availability | 2026-06-04 | **Complete** | No |
| A-169 | Ross | Complete Varun Mehra's vulnerable sector check before granting FamCare data access | 2026-06-04 | **Complete** | No |
| A-170 | Marcus / Gabrielle | Redesign abuse module as intake-form wizard; produce initial wireframes for Kelvin review | 2026-06-04 | In Progress | No |
| A-171 | Marcus (Rob) | Send updated PCFS status report: revised July go-live, abuse as separate iteration, updated meeting cadence | 2026-05-21 | Open | No |
| A-172 | Kelvin (PCFS) | Reach out to service delivery team to confirm availability for case file automated task form review | 2026-05-21 | **Complete** | No |
| A-173 | Marcus / Gabrielle | Update case notes spec: tighten intro, consolidate document types list, fix supervision tag, remove visits forward reference, add standard logging definition to all spec docs | 2026-05-21 | **Complete** | No |
| A-174 | Gabrielle / Varun | Set up Freshdesk UAT feedback triage; configure Ross reporting (open/closed/backlog) | 2026-05-21 | **Complete** | No |
| A-175 | Marcus | Run UAT kickoff walkthrough for client+family data module with PCFS testers (~1 hour) | 2026-05-21 | **Complete** | No |
| A-176 | Marcus | Clarify with finance team which budget pool covers intake-related purchases | 2026-05-21 | Open | No |

## Issues & Risks

| # | Description | Severity | Owner | Due Date | Status |
|---|-------------|---------|-------|----------|--------|
| I-018 | Finance/Sage integration requirements incomplete — Sage 300 PO module specifics not yet clarified; PO workflow and credit card reconciliation substantially documented; formal receipt and integration design not yet started | Medium | Hailey / Marcus | 2026-01-29 | Open |
| I-029 | Timeline slippage — go-live revised to end of July 2026 at May 11 reset meeting; all key stakeholders aligned; formal contract re-baselining (A-112) still pending | High | Marcus | 2026-02-12 | Open |
| I-032 | Development timeline at risk — Azure DevOps CI/CD in place; client+family data module now UAT-ready; Entra environment setup resolved; intake and notifications in late dev/QA | High | Marcus | 2026-03-12 | Open |
| I-033 | Address-based search confirmed as new development requirement — adds scope to constrained timeline; iteration sequencing impact not yet assessed | Medium | Marcus | 2026-03-26 | Open |
| I-034 | Client-side continuity risk — Haley absent 3+ months; Clemene covering; abuse program clerk Alice approaching retirement | Medium | Marcus / Ross | 2026-04-07 | Open |
| I-035 | Abuse program requirements — May 11 decision: abuse redesigned as wizard-style separate iteration; approach clarified; wireframes in progress (A-170) | Medium | Marcus / Kelvin / Clemene | 2026-04-30 | Open |
| I-036 | Alpha testing / UAT — UAT process formally defined; tester list prepared; client+family data UAT walkthrough completed; Freshdesk triage operational | Low | Gabrielle | 2026-04-30 | Open |
| I-037 | Demo environment crash at Apr 28 finance meeting — UAT environment now set up in PCFS Azure; risk reduced | Medium | Ross / IDFusion | 2026-05-21 | Open |
| I-038 | Wabanong intake form incomplete — current form missing mandatory Manitoba CFS Act abuse issue categories; Darryl to provide full list (A-161) | Medium | Marcus | 2026-05-21 | Open |
| I-039 | Holiday calendar missing — timer logic does not account for observed holidays; required for accurate SLA tracking in finance and abuse workflows | Medium | Ross / IDFusion | 2026-05-21 | Open |
| I-040 | Azure Entra/conditional access setup delayed UAT kickoff — tester accounts could not be created until Entra configuration resolved; resolved via A-166 | Medium | Ross / Campfire | 2026-05-21 | Resolved |

## Return to Green Plans

### Overall — 🔴 Red (first flagged: 2025-W48)

- Complete client+family data UAT cycle within W23 to establish iteration velocity baseline; begin triage of feedback via Freshdesk → ClickUp pipeline
- Deliver abuse module redesign wireframes (A-170) and schedule Kelvin review session to keep the separate abuse iteration moving
- Maintain new weekly Marcus/Ross/Christina cadence; bring Kelvin in only for specific module reviews

### Schedule — 🔴 Red (first flagged: 2025-W48)

- Send updated PCFS status report communicating July end-of-month target (A-171); ensure Clemene and all stakeholders have formal acknowledgment
- Formally re-baseline contract timeline (A-112) — all key stakeholders aligned on July; no signed-off schedule exists yet
- Complete client+family data UAT cycle in W23 to measure actual velocity before scheduling remaining module iterations

### Scope — 🟡 Yellow (first flagged: 2025-W50)

- Signs of Safety additions from May 6 confirmed in-scope; wireframe updates completed (A-163–A-165 resolved) — developers can now begin implementation
- Skabe Support V2 deferral agreed at May 11 — communicate formally to stakeholders to prevent scope re-entry
- Abuse iteration scope to be locked before wireframe kickoff (A-170 in progress); route all new requests through agreed roadmap framework

### Budget — 🟡 Yellow (first flagged: 2025-W50)

- Abuse as separate iteration may require contract amendment — flag to Rob and Clemene when sending updated status report (A-171)
- No new cost exposures this period; monitor Azure environment costs as UAT and production environments come online
- Confirm whether intake category additions (A-161) and holiday calendar (A-152) create out-of-scope development costs before implementation begins

### Client's Feeling — 🟡 Yellow (first flagged: 2026-W13)

- May 11 reset meeting had constructive, collaborative tone; Kelvin and Christina actively engaged; maintain this momentum
- Send updated status report promptly (A-171) before client starts wondering about the July timeline commitment
- Monitor Clemene's engagement as delays accumulate; July target needs formal acknowledgment at leadership level

## Next Period Plan (2026-W23: 2026-05-22 → 2026-06-04)

- Complete client+family data UAT cycle and document results; triage incoming Freshdesk feedback via ClickUp pipeline and provide first status report to Ross
- Finalize abuse module wizard wireframes (A-170) and schedule Kelvin review session to kick off the separate abuse iteration
- Send updated PCFS status report with revised July go-live target (A-171); formally re-baseline contract timeline (A-112)
- Deliver updated intake wireframes (A-162 complete; await full issue categories list from Darryl — A-161 still open)
- Progress finance dashboard wireframes (A-149, A-150) and ongoing services spec updates (A-157) to keep non-UAT modules advancing
